subcodes.title: Words spoken at Hotel Marquardt in Stuttgart, 1913-04-02
subcodes.first_line: I was very happy last night because I saw that your hearts are ablaze with the fire of the love of God… Those in attendance were baptized with the divine spirit and the fire of the love of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: من دیشب خیلی مسرُور بودم زیرا میدیدم در قلوب شما نار محبّت اللّٰه شعلهور است و نفثات روح القدس
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @love of God, @spiritual baptism, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @The Holy Spirit
